channel.title: Life on DeanHub | Code Is Life
channel.description: Recent content in Life on DeanHub | Code Is Life

item.title: Life Lessons
item.description: Life Lessons Link to heading Always Remember to Live in the Present Shi Tiesheng once wrote: “When I was healthy and whole, I often complained about the poor environment around me. After I became paralyzed, I yearned for the days when I could walk and run. A few years later, when I developed bedsores, I missed the time I could sit comfortably in a wheelchair. Later, when I was diagnosed with kidney failure, I longed for the days with just bedsores.
